title: Minimal cited-vs-blank-slate eval as an early go/no-go kill-gate (handful of fixtures)
context: Before committing to the large M2 content investment (attorney-reviewed explainer set), Know-Your-Rights needs an early thesis check: does cited + jurisdiction-scoped content actually outperform blank-slate LLM answers on a small fixture set? This minimal eval at M1 is a kill-gate: if cited+scoped does not at least trend ahead on accuracy, citation coverage, and jurisdiction-fitness, HIGH-tier content work pauses for review rather than proceeding to M2. Depends on the provenance model (task 007).
objective: Implement a minimal cited-vs-blank-slate eval harness (scripts/eval-grounded.ts) that runs a small fixture set of tenant-rights questions through both a cited+jurisdiction-scoped content path and a blank-slate LLM path, scores each on accuracy, citation coverage, and jurisdiction-fitness, and reports the delta as a go/no-go signal. If cited+scoped does not trend ahead, M2 HIGH-tier content work pauses.
acceptanceCriteria: Eval harness implemented in scripts/eval-grounded.ts; runs a fixture set of at least 5 tenant-rights questions through both a cited+jurisdiction-scoped content path and a blank-slate LLM generation path

Scores each response on at least three dimensions: accuracy (claim matches vetted source), citation coverage (cited vs uncited), and jurisdiction-fitness (claim is scoped to a named jurisdiction vs unscoped)
Reports a structured result: scored delta between cited+scoped and blank-slate paths, with per-fixture breakdown and an overall go/no-go verdict

Kill-gate logic: if cited+scoped does not score ahead of blank-slate on the majority of fixtures, the eval exits non-zero and the CI step reports 'PAUSE M2 — thesis not confirmed'; the result is logged for maintainer review
The eval is neutral/provider-agnostic: the LLM client is behind a thin adapter; no vendor lock-in in the eval harness
pnpm test passes with the eval harness wired in as an optional CI step; fixtures committed to the repo
Reviewed by maintainer and editorial reviewer; go/no-go result recorded
output: A merged PR containing the minimal cited-vs-blank-slate eval harness (scripts/eval-grounded.ts), a fixture set of tenant-rights questions, scoring logic, and a go/no-go CI step — an early kill-gate before M2 HIGH-tier content investment.
